items.q: What is the difference between ozone depletion and climate change?
items.correct: Two distinct issues - ozone depletion is about UV protection (caused mainly by CFCs); climate change is about heat trapping (caused mainly by CO2).
items.random_wrong: Ozone depletion causes climate change directly.
items.why: Students conflate these as 'the atmosphere problem'. They involve different gases, different atmospheric layers, different mechanisms, and different (though sometimes connected) environmental consequences.

items.q: Why are top predators most affected by persistent pollutants like mercury?
items.correct: Biomagnification concentrates pollutants at each trophic level up the food chain.
items.misconception: Predators are exposed to more pollution directly.
items.why: Students focus on direct exposure. The mechanism is concentration through eating contaminated prey - small accumulations in lower levels multiply upward, so apex predators have the highest body burdens.

items.q: Why is ice-albedo feedback a positive feedback loop?
items.correct: Less ice means less reflective surface, so more sunlight is absorbed, causing more warming and more melting.
items.misconception: Because warming is positive (a good thing).
items.random_wrong: Because polar bears help spread heat.
items.why: Students confuse 'positive' (mathematics) with 'good' (everyday). Positive feedback amplifies the change, in any direction - a negative outcome can result from a positive feedback loop.

items.q: Which cycle has no significant atmospheric phase?
items.why: It's Phosphorus. “Carbon” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.

items.q: Average time in a reservoir is called?
items.why: It's Residence time. “Flux” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.

items.q: Approximate residence time of CO2 in the atmosphere in years (centennial estimate)?
items.why: Exact answer: 100 years. Estimation gets you near it; only the anchored number survives the exam hall.
